question: The chart shows departmental energy consumption. Which statement is most accurate based on the data shown?

options.A: IT and Logistics use the same amount of energy.
options.B: Manufacturing uses nearly three times as much energy as R&D.
options.C: Manufacturing has the highest energy consumption among the departments shown.
options.D: Offices uses more energy than Manufacturing.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
